historical_record_policy: The v2 bytes and receipts remain immutable. V2 preserves chronology but its scalar pass rule is algebraically invalid and cannot govern a promotion verdict.
supersession_reasons: V2 compares the emitted total Delta_source coordinate with a residual coordinate.
V2 assigns one point and one S target to CL-1 and CL-2 even though CL-2 adds alpha_U(P).
V2 treats the open electroweak and same-scheme remainder as zero inside a purported hadronic-only target.
A singleton payload evaluated at the incomplete-map P fixed point cannot certify either completed self-consistent map.

activation_requirements.required_target_access_policy: Freeze the complete source algorithm before a genuinely withheld future data release, or use an audited clean-room operator/team with no target access.
activation_requirements.note: Do not populate this file in place. Issue a new immutable successor with a detached activation manifest and external anchor before eligible work. This corrective scaffold and its present source-method choices were authored after target access, cannot be made blind retroactively, and cannot govern V1.

measurement_coordinate.u_A_semantics: CODATA quoted standard uncertainty (1 sigma); not by itself a hard falsification bound

coordinate_definitions.type_rule: A Delta_source_total payload may be compared only with a Delta_source_total target. A residual may be compared only after subtracting the same declared implemented baseline on both sides.

shared_payload_contract.required_object: A target-blind function or certified interval enclosure Delta_source_total(P), not a scalar at one P.
shared_payload_contract.required_domain: The registered P basin traversed by both completed fixed-point solvers.

point_diagnostics_only.S_hadronic_null_reason: S_QEW_effective may be called hadronic only after a source theorem and scheme lock prove Delta_EW=0.

CL-1.pass_rule: No pass/fail rule is registered in this corrective scaffold. A future successor must solve and interval-certify G1, freeze confidence and width criteria, and use COMPATIBLE/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE; overlap alone is insufficient.

point_diagnostics_only.S_hadronic_null_reason: S_QEW_effective may be called hadronic only after a source theorem and scheme lock prove Delta_EW=0.

CL-2.pass_rule: No pass/fail rule is registered in this corrective scaffold. A future successor must solve and interval-certify G2, freeze confidence and width criteria, and use COMPATIBLE/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE; overlap alone is insufficient.

required_future_decision_fields: combined experimental, numerical, and theory uncertainty rule
maximum prediction width eligible for a compatibility or closure claim
three-way COMPATIBLE, FAIL, and INCONCLUSIVE outcomes
primary_scoring_rule.failure_scope: A failed, otherwise complete map falsifies only its named registered formulation. Framework-level scope requires every premise and readout gate used by that formulation to be closed before execution.

required_receipts: target-free producer dependency DAG and forbidden-input scan
valid external timestamp preceding the first eligible payload commit
blindness_and_provenance_requirements.audit_hash_scope_warning: These local working-tree hashes aid this erratum audit only. They are not a complete transitive dependency DAG, signature, external timestamp, clean-room receipt, or activation manifest. A future successor must construct and independently verify those objects afresh.

declared_outcomes.CL-1_COMPATIBLE: Available only under a future frozen confidence and maximum-width contract; overlap alone is insufficient.
declared_outcomes.CL-1_FAIL: Available only after every CL-1 premise, physical-map, provenance, and uncertainty gate closes.
declared_outcomes.CL-1_INCONCLUSIVE: Required for open gates, excess prediction width, or any outcome outside the frozen compatible/fail predicates.
declared_outcomes.CL-2_COMPATIBLE: Available only under a future frozen confidence and maximum-width contract; overlap alone is insufficient.
declared_outcomes.CL-2_FAIL: Available only after every CL-2 premise, physical-map, provenance, and uncertainty gate closes.
declared_outcomes.CL-2_INCONCLUSIVE: Required for open gates, excess prediction width, or any outcome outside the frozen compatible/fail predicates.
declared_outcomes.both_maps: No scalar shortcut exists. Each completed map receives its own independent three-way adjudication.
